query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, period, branchName FROM kpi_target_cards_detail WHERE period = '2026/3' AND branchName LIKE '%BAKIRKÖY%' GROUP BY period, branchName;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46m8FvVm7HSsc1z.root --database 6XmnMHSGkmqmcvGw6sxZ3M --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, period, branchName FROM kpi_target_cards_detail WHERE period = '2026/3' AND branchName LIKE '%BAKIRKÖY%' GROUP BY period, branchName;
